- [x] Customize the Project

## Project Requirements
- Next.js
- TypeScript
- CSS/SCSS modules
- No CSS frameworks (e.g., Bootstrap, Tailwind)

## Setup Steps
1. Project scaffolded with Next.js and TypeScript.
2. SCSS module example added in styles/example.module.scss.
3. README updated with usage and requirements.

Continue working through this checklist as you develop the project.
